content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — demo credentials exist (review_information/demo_user.txt, demo_password.txt) but notes.txt is "n/a" and does not explain how to reach the subscription-gated blocking/schedules/reports features (App/PaywallView.swift:7).
Pierre: Apple's reviewers reject or delay apps under 2.1 when they cannot exercise core functionality, and FocusShield gates its main features behind both a login and a paywall. The credentials look real, but "n/a" notes give no path past the paywall (e.g., a sandbox account, promo unlock, or steps to test blocking). Add review notes describing how to sign in, how to access premium features without a real charge, and any Screen Time permission steps.
